260527_bmk1_RNAi

Sam Zavislan-Pullaro

2026-05-27

  • load libraries
  • Import the data that was outputted from the new macro:
  • Create annotation columns
  • Align the erm-1 channel info
  • re-arrange the dataset and calculate the means
  • Try to create a metric of “membrane-y-ness” for each condition combo
  • Calculate the statistics
  • Session info

load libraries

library(tidyverse)
library(gridExtra)
library(data.table)
library(rstatix)

Import the data that was outputted from the new macro:

Note:

channel 1 = set-3

channel 2 = erm-1

# import the control data
# control data comes from no RNAi set-3 erm-1 controls 
control_1 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-5-21_162_datafile_for_221011_LP306_no_treatment.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
control_2 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-5-21_1642_datafile_for_240610_LP306_erm-1.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
control_3 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-5-29_1622_datafile_for_240621_LP306_erm-1_set-3.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
control_4 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-5-29_1630_datafile_for_240701_LP306_erm-1_set-3.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")

# import RNAi treatment data 
test_1 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-5-26_1149_datafile_for_220719_LP306_bmk-1_RNAi.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
test_2 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-5-29_1454_datafile_for_230408_LP306_BMK-1_rep1.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
test_3 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-5-26_1242_datafile_for_231107_LP306_BMK-1_rep2.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
test_4 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-5-26_1449_datafile_for_231113_LP306_BMK-1_rep3.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")

# test its dimensions
#dim(control_1)
#dim(control_2)
#dim(test_1)
#dim(test_2)
#dim(test_3)
#dim(test_4)

# Rename the column names
col_times <- paste(rep(1:333), sep = "")
colnames(control_1) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)
colnames(control_2) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)
colnames(control_3) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)
colnames(control_4) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)
colnames(test_1) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)
colnames(test_2) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)
colnames(test_3) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)
colnames(test_4) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)

# Check that the dimensions remain unchanged
dim(control_1)
## [1]  13 336
dim(control_2)
## [1]   3 336
dim(control_3)
## [1]  11 336
dim(control_4)
## [1]  17 336
dim(test_1)
## [1]   7 336
dim(test_2)
## [1]  15 336
dim(test_3)
## [1]   9 336
dim(test_4)
## [1]   7 336
# control_1[1:9,1:8]
# control_2[1:9,1:8]
# control_3[1:9,1:8]
# control_4[1:9,1:8]
# test_1[1:9,1:8]
# test_2[1:9,1:8]
# test_3[1:9,1:8]
# test_4[1:9,1:8]

Create annotation columns

# Extract out the salient information from the filename and pivot the data longer - "permed" version
# Had to manually change image names to follow convention/consistency

control_1_exp <- control_1[2:dim(control_1)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_"))
 
control_2_exp <- control_2[2:dim(control_2)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_"))
 
control_3_exp <- control_3[2:dim(control_3)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_")) 

control_4_exp <- control_4[2:dim(control_4)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_"))
 
test_1_exp <- test_1[2:dim(test_1)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_"))

test_2_exp <- test_2[2:dim(test_2)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_"))

test_3_exp <- test_3[2:dim(test_3)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_"))

test_4_exp <- test_4[2:dim(test_4)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_"))
# Add in the timepoints

addInTimepoints <- function(tibble) {
  timepoints <- as.vector(unlist(control_1[1,3:335]))
  repnumb = dim(tibble)[1]/333
  tibble::add_column(tibble, timepoints = rep(timepoints,repnumb), .after = "xpoint")
}

control_1_plustime <- addInTimepoints(control_1_exp)
control_2_plustime <- addInTimepoints(control_2_exp)
control_3_plustime <- addInTimepoints(control_3_exp)
control_4_plustime <- addInTimepoints(control_4_exp)
test_1_plustime <- addInTimepoints(test_1_exp)
test_2_plustime <- addInTimepoints(test_2_exp)
test_3_plustime <- addInTimepoints(test_3_exp)
test_4_plustime <- addInTimepoints(test_4_exp)

# check it
# control_1_plustime[330:340,]
# control_2_plustime[330:340,]
# test_1_plustime[330:340,]
# test_2_plustime[330:340,]
# test_3_plustime[330:340,]
# test_4_plustime[330:340,]
# Merge the datasets together 
bmk1_RNAi_data_total <- rbind(control_1_plustime, control_2_plustime, control_3_plustime, control_4_plustime, test_1_plustime, test_2_plustime, test_3_plustime, test_4_plustime)

# Plot it - all samples
ggplot(data = bmk1_RNAi_data_total, aes(x = timepoints, y = intensity, group = c(unique_id))) +
  geom_line(aes(colour = unique_id))+
  facet_wrap(~ channel + treatment)+
  guides(color = "none")+
  theme_bw()

Align the erm-1 channel info

This step isn’t really necessary but can help align the erm-1 samples based on the peak. Any associated set-3 samples come along for the ride.

Ideas - consider removing this step.

# Split out channel 2
channel_2_only <- bmk1_RNAi_data_total %>%
  filter(channel == "ch2" & treatment == "control")
unique(channel_2_only$embryoID, channel_2_only$date)
##  [1] "06" "08" "13" "14" "17" "21" "01" "04" "10" "12" "07" "09"
# Split out channel 1
channel_1_only <- bmk1_RNAi_data_total %>%
  filter(channel == "ch1" | treatment == "bmk-1-RNAi")

# Check that everything worked
dim(bmk1_RNAi_data_total)
## [1] 24642     9
dim(channel_2_only)
## [1] 6660    9
dim(channel_1_only)
## [1] 17982     9
# Align by finding max per variable and adjusting row_id
channel_2_dt <- as.data.table(channel_2_only)
#channel_2_only
channel_2_dt$xpoint <- as.integer(channel_2_dt$xpoint)
channel_2_dt[, aligned_row := xpoint - (which.max(intensity) - 1), by = unique_id]
#channel_2_dt
channel2_dcast <- dcast(channel_2_dt, strain + aligned_row ~ unique_id, value.var = "intensity")

#channel2_dcast
dim(channel2_dcast)
## [1] 463  22
# Create align rows for channel 1
channel_1_dt <- as.data.table(channel_1_only)
channel_1_dt$xpoint <- as.integer(channel_1_dt$xpoint)

# Create an aligned row for channel 1
dim(channel_1_dt)[1]
## [1] 17982
head(channel_1_dt)
##      date strain treatment embryoID channel xpoint timepoints intensity
##    <char> <char>    <char>   <char>  <char>  <int>      <num>     <num>
## 1: 221011  LP306   control       06     ch1      1     0.0000  6744.110
## 2: 221011  LP306   control       06     ch1      2     0.1072  6764.752
## 3: 221011  LP306   control       06     ch1      3     0.2144  6796.785
## 4: 221011  LP306   control       06     ch1      4     0.3215  6841.577
## 5: 221011  LP306   control       06     ch1      5     0.4287  6882.907
## 6: 221011  LP306   control       06     ch1      6     0.5359  6929.439
##                      unique_id
##                         <char>
## 1: 221011_LP306_control_06_ch1
## 2: 221011_LP306_control_06_ch1
## 3: 221011_LP306_control_06_ch1
## 4: 221011_LP306_control_06_ch1
## 5: 221011_LP306_control_06_ch1
## 6: 221011_LP306_control_06_ch1
iterations = dim(channel_1_dt)[1]/333
aligned_row = rep(-166:166, iterations)
length(aligned_row)
## [1] 17982
channel_1_dt <- cbind(channel_1_dt, aligned_row)
channel1_dcast <- dcast(channel_1_dt, strain + aligned_row ~ unique_id, value.var = "intensity")

dim(channel1_dcast)
## [1] 333  56
# Merge back together
# Pivot long - ch2
colnames(channel2_dcast)
##  [1] "strain"                      "aligned_row"                
##  [3] "221011_LP306_control_06_ch2" "221011_LP306_control_08_ch2"
##  [5] "221011_LP306_control_13_ch2" "221011_LP306_control_14_ch2"
##  [7] "221011_LP306_control_17_ch2" "221011_LP306_control_21_ch2"
##  [9] "240610_LP306_control_01_ch2" "240621_LP306_control_01_ch2"
## [11] "240621_LP306_control_04_ch2" "240621_LP306_control_06_ch2"
## [13] "240621_LP306_control_10_ch2" "240621_LP306_control_12_ch2"
## [15] "240701_LP306_control_01_ch2" "240701_LP306_control_04_ch2"
## [17] "240701_LP306_control_06_ch2" "240701_LP306_control_07_ch2"
## [19] "240701_LP306_control_08_ch2" "240701_LP306_control_09_ch2"
## [21] "240701_LP306_control_10_ch2" "240701_LP306_control_13_ch2"
ch2_align_long <- channel2_dcast %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = (`221011_LP306_control_06_ch2`:`240701_LP306_control_13_ch2`), names_to = "unique_id", values_to = "intensity")

#channel2_dcast

# pivot long - ch1
colnames(channel1_dcast)
##  [1] "strain"                         "aligned_row"                   
##  [3] "220719_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_01_ch1" "220719_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_01_ch2"
##  [5] "220719_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_02_ch1" "220719_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_02_ch2"
##  [7] "220719_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_09_ch1" "220719_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_09_ch2"
##  [9] "221011_LP306_control_06_ch1"    "221011_LP306_control_08_ch1"   
## [11] "221011_LP306_control_13_ch1"    "221011_LP306_control_14_ch1"   
## [13] "221011_LP306_control_17_ch1"    "221011_LP306_control_21_ch1"   
## [15] "230408_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_04_ch1" "230408_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_04_ch2"
## [17] "230408_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_08_ch1" "230408_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_08_ch2"
## [19] "230408_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_10_ch1" "230408_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_10_ch2"
## [21] "230408_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_12_ch1" "230408_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_12_ch2"
## [23] "230408_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_13_ch1" "230408_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_13_ch2"
## [25] "230408_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_14_ch1" "230408_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_14_ch2"
## [27] "230408_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_15_ch1" "230408_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_15_ch2"
## [29] "231107_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_01_ch1" "231107_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_01_ch2"
## [31] "231107_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_02_ch1" "231107_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_02_ch2"
## [33] "231107_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_06_ch1" "231107_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_06_ch2"
## [35] "231107_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_10_ch1" "231107_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_10_ch2"
## [37] "231113_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_04_ch1" "231113_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_04_ch2"
## [39] "231113_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_05_ch1" "231113_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_05_ch2"
## [41] "231113_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_06_ch1" "231113_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_06_ch2"
## [43] "240610_LP306_control_01_ch1"    "240621_LP306_control_01_ch1"   
## [45] "240621_LP306_control_04_ch1"    "240621_LP306_control_06_ch1"   
## [47] "240621_LP306_control_10_ch1"    "240621_LP306_control_12_ch1"   
## [49] "240701_LP306_control_01_ch1"    "240701_LP306_control_04_ch1"   
## [51] "240701_LP306_control_06_ch1"    "240701_LP306_control_07_ch1"   
## [53] "240701_LP306_control_08_ch1"    "240701_LP306_control_09_ch1"   
## [55] "240701_LP306_control_10_ch1"    "240701_LP306_control_13_ch1"
ch1_align_long <- channel1_dcast %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = (`220719_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_01_ch1`:`240701_LP306_control_13_ch1`), names_to = "unique_id", values_to = "intensity")

# Check that all the colnames and data types match
colnames(ch2_align_long)
## [1] "strain"      "aligned_row" "unique_id"   "intensity"
colnames(ch1_align_long)
## [1] "strain"      "aligned_row" "unique_id"   "intensity"
str(ch2_align_long)
## tibble [9,260 × 4] (S3: tbl_df/tbl/data.frame)
##  $ strain     : chr [1:9260] "LP306" "LP306" "LP306" "LP306" ...
##  $ aligned_row: num [1:9260] -168 -168 -168 -168 -168 -168 -168 -168 -168 -168 ...
##  $ unique_id  : chr [1:9260] "221011_LP306_control_06_ch2" "221011_LP306_control_08_ch2" "221011_LP306_control_13_ch2" "221011_LP306_control_14_ch2" ...
##  $ intensity  : num [1:9260] NA NA NA NA NA ...
str(ch1_align_long)
## tibble [17,982 × 4] (S3: tbl_df/tbl/data.frame)
##  $ strain     : chr [1:17982] "LP306" "LP306" "LP306" "LP306" ...
##  $ aligned_row: int [1:17982] -166 -166 -166 -166 -166 -166 -166 -166 -166 -166 ...
##  $ unique_id  : chr [1:17982] "220719_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_01_ch1" "220719_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_01_ch2" "220719_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_02_ch1" "220719_LP306_bmk-1-RNAi_02_ch2" ...
##  $ intensity  : num [1:17982] 4878 4685 4130 4521 3429 ...
ch1_align_long$aligned_row <- as.numeric(ch1_align_long$aligned_row )

# Merge back together
total_align_long <- rbind(ch2_align_long, ch1_align_long)
total_align_long %>%
  group_by(aligned_row) %>%
  summarize(
    n_total = n(),
    n_na = sum(is.na(intensity)),
    pct_na = mean(is.na(intensity)) * 100
  ) %>%
  arrange(aligned_row) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

re-arrange the dataset and calculate the means

# Normalize the data by dividing by the embryo-specific mean
bmk1_norm_total <- total_align_long %>%
  separate_wider_delim(unique_id, delim = "_", names = c("date", NA, "treatment", "embryoID", "channel")) %>%
  group_by(date, embryoID, channel, treatment) %>%
  mutate(normalized_intensity = intensity / mean(intensity, na.rm = TRUE))
table(bmk1_norm_total$channel, bmk1_norm_total$treatment)
##      
##       bmk-1-RNAi control
##   ch1       5661    6660
##   ch2       5661    9260
head(bmk1_norm_total)
## # A tibble: 6 × 8
## # Groups:   date, embryoID, channel, treatment [6]
##   strain aligned_row date   treatment embryoID channel intensity
##   <chr>        <dbl> <chr>  <chr>     <chr>    <chr>       <dbl>
## 1 LP306         -168 221011 control   06       ch2            NA
## 2 LP306         -168 221011 control   08       ch2            NA
## 3 LP306         -168 221011 control   13       ch2            NA
## 4 LP306         -168 221011 control   14       ch2            NA
## 5 LP306         -168 221011 control   17       ch2            NA
## 6 LP306         -168 221011 control   21       ch2            NA
## # ℹ 1 more variable: normalized_intensity <dbl>
# Separate out the unique identifier info, then pivot sider
bmk1_wide_by_sample <- bmk1_norm_total %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(date, embryoID, channel, treatment), 
            values_from = normalized_intensity,
            id_cols = c(strain, aligned_row))


# Second Try - Separate out the unique identifier info, then pivot sider
bmk1_wide_by_sample <- bmk1_norm_total %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(date, embryoID), 
            values_from = normalized_intensity,
            id_cols = c(strain, aligned_row, treatment, channel))



colnames(bmk1_wide_by_sample)
##  [1] "strain"      "aligned_row" "treatment"   "channel"     "221011_06"  
##  [6] "221011_08"   "221011_13"   "221011_14"   "221011_17"   "221011_21"  
## [11] "240610_01"   "240621_01"   "240621_04"   "240621_06"   "240621_10"  
## [16] "240621_12"   "240701_01"   "240701_04"   "240701_06"   "240701_07"  
## [21] "240701_08"   "240701_09"   "240701_10"   "240701_13"   "220719_01"  
## [26] "220719_02"   "220719_09"   "230408_04"   "230408_08"   "230408_10"  
## [31] "230408_12"   "230408_13"   "230408_14"   "230408_15"   "231107_01"  
## [36] "231107_02"   "231107_06"   "231107_10"   "231113_04"   "231113_05"  
## [41] "231113_06"
# Play around with mean, medium, and sum:
bmk1_wide_with_stats <- bmk1_wide_by_sample %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(sum_signal = sum(c_across(`221011_06`:`231113_06`))) %>%
  mutate(mean_signal = mean(c_across(`221011_06`:`231113_06`), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(median_signal = median(c_across(`221011_06`:`231113_06`), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_signal = sd(c_across(`221011_06`:`231113_06`), na.rm = TRUE))

# colnames(noco_wide_with_stats)

bmk1_wide_with_range <- bmk1_wide_with_stats %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(ymeanmax = sum(mean_signal, sd_signal) ) %>%
  mutate(ymeanmin = sum(mean_signal, -sd_signal)) 

colorselection = c("#000000", "#2189ce")

# Plot split by Nocodazole concentration
a <- ggplot(data = bmk1_wide_with_range, aes(x = aligned_row, y = mean_signal, group = interaction(channel, treatment)))+
  geom_line(aes(color=channel))+
  scale_color_manual(values = colorselection, aesthetics = c("colour", "fill"), labels = c("set-1 mRNA", "erm-1 mRNA"))+
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ymeanmin, ymax = ymeanmax, fill=channel), alpha = 0.2, ) +
  facet_wrap(~ treatment)+
  theme_bw()

a

#pdf(file = "../03_outputPlots/260315_erm_set3_nocodazole.pdf", width = 4, height = 3)

a

dev.off()
## null device 
##           1
# Plot in a different way - set-3 and erm-1 mRNA split into facets
colorselection = c("#2189ce", "#000000")
channel.labs <- c("set-3 mRNA", "erm-1 mRNA")
names(channel.labs) <- c("ch1", "ch2")

# Plot split by transcript
b <- ggplot(data = bmk1_wide_with_range, aes(x = aligned_row, y = mean_signal, group = interaction(channel, treatment)))+
  geom_line(aes(color=treatment))+
  scale_color_manual(values = colorselection, aesthetics = c("colour", "fill"), labels = c("no RNAi", "bmk-1 RNAi"))+
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ymeanmin, ymax = ymeanmax, fill=treatment), alpha = 0.2, ) +
  facet_wrap(~ channel, labeller = labeller(channel = channel.labs))+
  theme_bw()

b


# pdf(file = "../03_outputPlots/260315_erm_set3_nocodazole_bytranscript.pdf", width = 4, height = 3)
# 
# b

dev.off()
## null device 
##           1

Try to create a metric of “membrane-y-ness” for each condition combo

I want a metric that reports the ratio of erm-1 intensity signal at “0” (the peak) versus at -100 or +100. I’ll take the average of -100 and +100.

# extract the "peak" at 1 versus the -100 and +100 values
peaks_and_valleys <- bmk1_norm_total %>%
  filter(aligned_row %in% c(-100,1,100))

# Nest the -100, 1, and +100 values into a single cell
nest_pandv <- peaks_and_valleys %>%
  group_by(date, treatment, embryoID, channel) %>%
  nest()

# A function to calculate the ratio of the value at 1 compared to the mean of -100 and +100
my_calc2 <- function(df) {
  df$normalized_intensity[2] / mean(df$normalized_intensity[1], df$normalized_intensity[3])
}

# Calculate the ratio for each datapoint
foldChange_calc <- nest_pandv %>%
  mutate(fc_enrich = map_dbl(data, my_calc2))

# Change some columns to factors
foldChange_calc$treatment <- as.factor(foldChange_calc$treatment)
foldChange_calc$channel <- as.factor(foldChange_calc$channel)

# calculate the max & min - figure out how to set the y-axis
summary(log(foldChange_calc$fc_enrich, base = 2))
##     Min.  1st Qu.   Median     Mean  3rd Qu.     Max.     NA's 
## -0.19903  0.06444  0.11947  0.18126  0.29161  0.75320        2
# plot the data:
d <- ggplot(data = foldChange_calc, aes(x = as.factor(channel), y = log(fc_enrich, base = 2), fill = treatment))+
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitterdodge())+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.5, 2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("0uM" = "darkgray", "150uM" = "lightblue"))+
  labs(y = "log2 FoldChange Enrichment of mRNA \n(mRNA intensity at 0 / mean mRNA intensity at -100 and 100)", x = "mRNA") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("ch1" = "set-3", "ch2" = "erm-1"))+
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)

d

e <- ggplot(data = foldChange_calc, aes(x = as.factor(treatment), y = log(fc_enrich, base = 2), fill = channel))+
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitterdodge())+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.5, 2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(y = "log2 FoldChange Enrichment of mRNA \n(mRNA intensity at 0 / mean mRNA intensity at -100 and 100)", x = "mRNA") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)

e

getwd()
## [1] "/Users/samzavislan/Desktop/onish/people/naly/projects/erm-1_LP306_RNAi/SZP260525_R_analysis/oldMacroRuns/bmk-1_RNAi_noRNAi/02_scripts"
library(dplyr)

foldChange_calc %>%
  group_by(treatment, channel) %>%
  summarise(
    min_val    = min(log(fc_enrich, base = 2), na.rm = TRUE),
    median_val = median(log(fc_enrich, base = 2), na.rm = TRUE),
    max_val    = max(log(fc_enrich, base = 2), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
## `summarise()` has regrouped the output.
## ℹ Summaries were computed grouped by treatment and channel.
## ℹ Output is grouped by treatment.
## ℹ Use `summarise(.groups = "drop_last")` to silence this message.
## ℹ Use `summarise(.by = c(treatment, channel))` for per-operation grouping
##   (`?dplyr::dplyr_by`) instead.
## # A tibble: 4 × 5
## # Groups:   treatment [2]
##   treatment  channel min_val median_val max_val
##   <fct>      <fct>     <dbl>      <dbl>   <dbl>
## 1 bmk-1-RNAi ch1     -0.0836     0.100    0.291
## 2 bmk-1-RNAi ch2     -0.199      0.228    0.753
## 3 control    ch1     -0.0612     0.0691   0.261
## 4 control    ch2      0.0253     0.307    0.665
foldChange_calc %>%
  mutate(log2_fc = log(fc_enrich, base = 2)) %>%
  group_by(treatment, channel) %>%
  slice(c(
    which.min(log2_fc),
    which(log2_fc == median(log2_fc)), 
    which.max(log2_fc)
  ))
## # A tibble: 10 × 7
## # Groups:   treatment, channel [4]
##    date   treatment  embryoID channel data             fc_enrich log2_fc
##    <chr>  <fct>      <chr>    <fct>   <list>               <dbl>   <dbl>
##  1 230408 bmk-1-RNAi 13       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     0.944 -0.0836
##  2 231107 bmk-1-RNAi 01       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.07   0.100 
##  3 231113 bmk-1-RNAi 06       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.22   0.291 
##  4 230408 bmk-1-RNAi 13       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     0.871 -0.199 
##  5 230408 bmk-1-RNAi 12       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.17   0.228 
##  6 231107 bmk-1-RNAi 10       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.69   0.753 
##  7 240701 control    10       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     0.958 -0.0612
##  8 221011 control    13       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.20   0.261 
##  9 240621 control    12       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.02   0.0253
## 10 240621 control    10       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.59   0.665
df <- foldChange_calc %>%
  mutate(log2_fc = log(fc_enrich, base = 2)) %>%
  group_by(treatment, channel) %>%
  mutate(med = median(log2_fc))

label_points <- bind_rows(
  df %>% slice(which.min(log2_fc))              %>% mutate(label = "min"),
  df %>% slice(which.min(abs(log2_fc - med)))   %>% mutate(label = "median"),
  df %>% slice(which.max(log2_fc))              %>% mutate(label = "max")
)
foldChange_calc %>%
  mutate(log2_fc = log(fc_enrich, base = 2)) %>%
  group_by(treatment, channel) %>%
  filter(log2_fc == min(log2_fc) | log2_fc == max(log2_fc))
## # A tibble: 6 × 7
## # Groups:   treatment, channel [3]
##   date   treatment  embryoID channel data             fc_enrich log2_fc
##   <chr>  <fct>      <chr>    <fct>   <list>               <dbl>   <dbl>
## 1 221011 control    13       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.20   0.261 
## 2 230408 bmk-1-RNAi 13       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     0.944 -0.0836
## 3 230408 bmk-1-RNAi 13       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     0.871 -0.199 
## 4 231107 bmk-1-RNAi 10       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.69   0.753 
## 5 231113 bmk-1-RNAi 06       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.22   0.291 
## 6 240701 control    10       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     0.958 -0.0612
library(ggrepel)

df <- foldChange_calc %>%
  mutate(log2_fc = log(fc_enrich, base = 2)) %>%
  group_by(treatment, channel) %>%
  mutate(med = median(log2_fc))

label_points <- bind_rows(
  df %>% slice(which.min(log2_fc))            %>% mutate(label = "min"),
  df %>% slice(which.min(abs(log2_fc - med))) %>% mutate(label = "median"),
  df %>% slice(which.max(log2_fc))            %>% mutate(label = "max")
) %>%
  # Keep only one label per row — if min/median/max land on same row, 
  # priority: min > max > median
  group_by(treatment, channel, date, embryoID) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()
label_points <- bind_rows(
  df %>% slice(which.min(log2_fc)) %>% mutate(label = "min"),
  df %>% slice(which.max(log2_fc)) %>% mutate(label = "max"),
  df %>% filter(n() >= 3) %>% 
         slice(which.min(abs(log2_fc - med))) %>% mutate(label = "median")
) %>%
  distinct(treatment, channel, date, embryoID, .keep_all = TRUE)
library(ggrepel)

e + geom_label_repel(
  data = label_points,
  aes(x = as.factor(treatment), y = log2_fc,
      label = paste(label, paste(date, embryoID, sep = "_"), sep = ": "),
      fill = channel),
  position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),  # matches geom_boxplot default
  size = 3,
  alpha = 0.8,
  max.overlaps = 20,
  show.legend = FALSE
)
## Warning: Removed 2 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_boxplot()`).
## Warning: Removed 2 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

## Save the datasets


# set plotname
today <- format(Sys.Date(), "%y%m%d")
filename <- paste("../03_outputPlots/", today, "_set3_erm1_boxplot_nocodazole1.pdf", sep = "")

pdf(filename, width = 6, height = 6)
d
dev.off()

getwd()

Calculate the statistics

foldChange_calc
## # A tibble: 74 × 6
## # Groups:   date, treatment, embryoID, channel [74]
##    date   treatment embryoID channel data             fc_enrich
##    <chr>  <fct>     <chr>    <fct>   <list>               <dbl>
##  1 221011 control   06       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.35
##  2 221011 control   08       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.16
##  3 221011 control   13       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.39
##  4 221011 control   14       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.16
##  5 221011 control   17       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.54
##  6 221011 control   21       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.51
##  7 240610 control   01       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     NA   
##  8 240621 control   01       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.49
##  9 240621 control   04       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.58
## 10 240621 control   06       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.22
## # ℹ 64 more rows
stats_wilcox <- foldChange_calc %>%
  group_by(channel) %>%
  wilcox_test(fc_enrich ~ treatment) %>%
  adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
  add_significance()

stats_wilcox
## # A tibble: 2 × 10
##   channel .y.       group1 group2    n1    n2 statistic     p p.adj p.adj.signif
##   <fct>   <chr>     <chr>  <chr>  <int> <int>     <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <chr>       
## 1 ch1     fc_enrich bmk-1… contr…    17    20       206 0.283 0.283 ns          
## 2 ch2     fc_enrich bmk-1… contr…    17    18       110 0.163 0.283 ns
